recommendations.title: Berlinguer: I Love You
recommendations.overview: A young poet falls in love with a sophisticated woman who hates poetry. But the poet wants to win her with poetry — and a bit of help from his mum.

recommendations.title: The Power of the Dog
recommendations.overview: A domineering but charismatic rancher wages a war of intimidation on his brother's new wife and her teen son, until long-hidden secrets come to light.

recommendations.title: In the Cut
recommendations.overview: A New York City writing professor, Frannie Avery, has an affair with a police detective who is investigating the murder of a beautiful young woman in her neighborhood.

recommendations.title: The Postman
recommendations.overview: Simple Italian postman learns to love poetry while delivering mail to a famous poet; he uses this to woo local beauty Beatrice.

recommendations.title: The Portrait of a Lady
